category_sources: Official GTK docs describe GdkPixbuf as an image loading library.
source_facts.description says it is a toolkit for image loading and pixel buffer manipulation.
display_name_sources: Official GTK docs use the GdkPixbuf namespace for the library.
docs_sources: Official GTK documentation page for GdkPixbuf lists API version, library version, website, and source.
repo_sources: Official GTK docs list Source as https://gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/gdk-pixbuf/.
tags_sources: Official GTK docs identify dependencies, C headers, and GObject integration.
source_facts.description describes image loading and pixel buffer manipulation.
